description: You are a robotics engineer designing a sealed actuator shaft. Create a cylindrical shaft with a 20 mm diameter and 60 mm length, extending along the Z-axis from Z=0 to Z=60. Include a circumferential O-ring groove centered 15 mm from the bottom face (Z=15). The groove must be 2.5 mm wide and 1.5 mm deep, extending from Z=13.75 to Z=16.25 and cutting from a radius of 10 mm down to 8.5 mm. Save the document as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/shaft_with_groove.FCStd.
